allow: PowerShell($proc = Start-Process -FilePath "C:\\Users\\PC\\AppData\\Roaming\\npm\\powerbi-modeling-mcp.cmd" -NoNewWindow -PassThru -RedirectStandardOutput "$env:TEMP\\pbi-out.txt" -RedirectStandardError "$env:TEMP\\pbi-err.txt"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $proc.Kill\(\); Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\pbi-out.txt" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\pbi-err.txt" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
